title: Introduction to AuthN and AuthZ Quiz
description: Test your fundamental knowledge about Authentication and Authorization in modern web apps.

questions.question: What is the primary goal of Authentication (AuthN)?
options: To define what a user is allowed to do.
To verify the identity of a user.

questions.question: Which process determines what an authenticated user is permitted to access?
What is Role-Based Access Control (RBAC)?
options: Assigning permissions to roles like 'Admin' or 'User' and then giving users those roles.
A way to automatically generate login forms.

questions.question: Why is it important to use a strong hashing algorithm like bcrypt for passwords?
options: To make the login process faster.
To prevent passwords from being recovered if the database is leaked.
To automatically validate user email addresses.

questions.question: Which authentication method uses a digital 'token' that is stored on the client side?
